forward.note: House model: iPhone ASP mix ($874→$1,021) + Services compounding to ~$164bn.
House view; sell-side PTs largely set on C27 EPS multiples.

trail.val: Citi models industry foldable units 20m/29m/45m (2025/26E/27E); Apple foldable ASP just under $1,000 in 2026/27
Citi/Counterpoint: ~6M foldable units 2026 (book-style); base iPhone 18 shifts to ~March 2027
MS (Woodring): FY27 "iPhone X-like cycle saved by pricing" — ~20m foldable units, $2,400 start, ~10pts ASP growth from foldable mix; OW PT $360, FY27E EPS $10.30

forward.note: The next ASP catalyst; FY27 the key cycle year on the foldable + base-iPhone calendar shift.

trail.val: Cook: "significantly higher" memory cost in June qtr, increasing impact beyond June; "range of options" (pricing)
Citi/Counterpoint: LPDDR5 +10–15% in Q3, +15–20% in Q2 (Q2 = calendar)
StoneX/TrendForce (Avril): Apple agreed ~+20% mobile DRAM increase in Q3; in first LTA wave w/ CSPs/NVIDIA (3-yr 2026-28); short of LPDDR5 output (fighting NVIDIA)

forward.note: Largest near-term GM/pricing risk; relative mitigant = lowest memory BOM + supply priority.

trail.val: Fubon: TSMC raised Apple wafer price only 1–2% FY26 (vs ~10% AI/HPC); FY27 N2/N3 hike starts ~10% including Apple (first time)
Redburn (Conor): TSMC Apple wafer hike low-single-digit 2026, then +≥10% in 2027 (first time Apple included)

forward.note: Forward COGS headwind into the A-series/foldable cycle; two independent reads corroborate.
High-margin annuity on 2.5bn+ devices, plus the Apple Ads expansion lever.
